heroSubtitle: We help small businesses bring ideas to life — from iOS/Android apps to online platforms.
heroSupport: All apps and sites run under SourceGrid Labs, so there's no need to maintain infrastructure or accounts.
themeHelp: Select Light or Dark theme before opening the showcase.
offerTitle: Build, launch, and operate under one platform.
offerIntro: Every project rides on the SourceGrid Labs backend, so marketing, operations, and mobile experiences stay in sync.

features.title: Launch-Ready Website
features.body: 6–8 page marketing site with CMS, SEO setup, and contact flows handled end-to-end.

features.title: Customer & Staff Portals
features.body: Logins, dashboards, and one core module (bookings, rentals, workflows) so customers and staff operate in one system.

features.title: Branded Mobile Apps
features.body: iOS + Android app synced to the same backend — we handle App Store / Google Play submissions for a fast launch.

features.title: Ops Automations & Insight
features.body: Built-in alerts, scheduled reports, and live health dashboards tied to bookings, payments, or inventory.

features.title: Managed Hosting & Support
features.body: SourceGrid Labs runs servers, monitoring, backups, and security updates with a fixed setup fee and predictable hosting.

hero.title: SourceGrid Labs Showcase
hero.description: Preview multi-brand marketing sites with live palettes, SourceGrid Labs templates, and a built-in Rails admin.

home.headline: From cobblestone street to candlelit suites.
home.body: A cinematic arrival: lantern-lit entry, quiet lobby bar, and suites that feel like a private townhouse.
home.sceneFallback: A closer look at light, texture, and service rituals.
home.gridSubtitle: A refined selection of pieces showcasing light, texture, and spatial clarity.
home.featureTitle: A third act of glass, light, and cadence.
home.featureSubtitle: Short, sharp moments that make the grid feel alive—hover to widen the frame.
home.stepsHeadline: A night traced in quiet scenes.
home.offeringBody: One composed moment — then back into shadow.
home.step1Body: Doors up at golden hour, counter-only, paced seatings so the line thins as the steam rises.
home.step2Body: Smoked, clarified, and poured in sequence while guests settle into the glow of the counter.
home.step3Body: Signature bowls land in waves, toppings torched and finished to order so each seat gets its own heatwave moment.
home.step4Body: Guests linger over last sips, late-night playlists, and quiet second rounds while steam hangs in the air above the counter.

pricing.headline: SourceGrid Labs Packages
pricing.subhead: Fixed-price websites, business systems, and mobile apps built for small companies that want clear deliverables.

small-website.name: Small Website
small-website.summary: 6–8 pages, mobile-friendly, contact form, basic admin.
small-website.description: A clean, professional website for small businesses needing a credible online presence and simple enquiry flow.

business-system.name: Business System
business-system.summary: Website plus one online system module with login + dashboard.
business-system.description: Add customer logins, staff dashboards, and a booking/rental/workflow module so teams can operate in one platform.

mobile-suite.name: Mobile App Suite
mobile-suite.summary: iOS and Android app plus backend system and website.
mobile-suite.description: Branded mobile apps with push notifications, in-app booking/ordering, and the same backend powering the website.

standard.name: Standard
standard.scope: Basic plus up to four small content/config updates monthly.

premium.name: Premium
premium.scope: Standard plus weekly adjustments and priority handling.

contact.heading: Concierge inquiry
